title: Living-investigator data + correction/removal policy
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Because the map names living investigators, it needs a privacy policy limiting fields to professional/public data plus a correction/removal process. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Define the living-investigator data policy (professional/public award-and-affiliation fields only) and a correction/removal request process, reviewed by the license reviewer.
acceptanceCriteria: Living-investigator data policy documented: only professional/public award-and-affiliation fields; no identifiable personal or patient data.
Correction/removal request process defined with a response SLA and provenance-preserving handling.
Policy reviewed by the license reviewer before merge.
output: docs/privacy-removal-policy.md documenting the living-investigator data + correction/removal policy, committed via PR.
